creator: ali.abdallah@suse.com
text:
(In reply to Mikael Urankar from comment #42)
What do you mean by they don't work? Can you be more specific? Which usb network device you are using? 

I tested the patch (v2) on a couple of network devices I have on FreeBSD 14.1 (both use if_ure), I no longer can reproduce the issue and network is stable so far.
